overview: Specializes in treating erectile dysfunction, premature ejaculation, and low testosterone through personalized treatment plans rooted in comprehensive evaluation. Offers in-person consultations with bloodwork, blood flow analysis, and nerve functionality testing.
highlights: Comprehensive initial evaluation with bloodwork, blood flow analysis, and nerve testing
Free test dose with first office consultation
California licensed providers with 20+ years of sexual health expertise
targetAudience: Men with erectile dysfunction, premature ejaculation, or low testosterone seeking specialized sexual health treatment.
